title: Container 15000TEU Model
document_text:
EDIT DESIGN MODEL / EBOM SUMMARY

Model ID   : MODEL-CNTR-15000TEU-001
Title      : Container 15000TEU Model
Discipline : 선체/의장 통합

1. Model Overview
This model summary defines the reusable engineering basis and EBOM scope for the 15,000 TEU container carrier.

2. EBOM Items
- HULL-BLOCK-C01 / Hull block assembly / Qty 18
- ENG-WINGD-01 / Main engine package WinGD / Qty 1
- DECK-CELLGUIDE-01 / Deck cell guide set / Qty 24
- LASHING-BRIDGE-01 / Lashing bridge set / Qty 8

3. Design Notes
- Existing container carrier hull model reused.
- Main engine arrangement follows WinGD package.
- Cargo outfitting focused on container deck arrangement.
model_notes: Existing container carrier hull model reused.
Main engine arrangement follows WinGD package.
